scripts.package: pnpm run build:shared-cli && pnpm run build:notarize-hook && pnpm run build:cli-bundle && pnpm run prepare:native-deps && electron-vite build && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.package:mac: pnpm run package:mac:arm64 && pnpm run package:mac:x64
scripts.package:mac:arm64: pnpm run build:shared-cli && pnpm run build:notarize-hook && pnpm run build:cli-bundle && pnpm run prepare:native-deps -- --arch=arm64 && electron-vite build && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.yml --mac --arm64 --publish never && bash scripts/finalize-macos-artifact.sh "release/build/mac-arm64/SuperTerminal.app" arm64
scripts.package:mac:arm64:install: pnpm run package:mac:arm64 && pnpm run install:mac:arm64:dev
scripts.package:mac:x64: pnpm run build:shared-cli && pnpm run build:notarize-hook && pnpm run build:cli-bundle && pnpm run prepare:native-deps -- --arch=x64 && electron-vite build && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.yml --mac --x64 --publish never && bash scripts/finalize-macos-artifact.sh "release/build/mac/SuperTerminal.app" x64
scripts.package:linux: pnpm run build:shared-cli && pnpm run build:notarize-hook && pnpm run build:cli-bundle && pnpm run prepare:native-deps && electron-vite build && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.yml --linux dir AppImage --publish never
scripts.package:win: pnpm run build:shared-cli && pnpm run build:notarize-hook && pnpm run build:cli-bundle && pnpm run prepare:native-deps -- --arch=x64 && electron-vite build && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:publish: pnpm run build:shared-cli && pnpm run build:notarize-hook && pnpm run build:cli-bundle && pnpm run prepare:native-deps && electron-vite build && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.yml --publish always
scripts.test: pnpm --dir ../.. run plugins:build && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:cli-smoke: pnpm run build:shared-cli && pnpm run build:scripts && pnpm run prepare:native-deps && pnpm run build:cli-bundle && node scripts/dist/cli-smoke-test.js
scripts.test:cli-stress: pnpm run build:shared-cli && pnpm run build:scripts && pnpm run prepare:native-deps && pnpm run build:cli-bundle && node scripts/dist/cli-stress-test.js
scripts.test:cli-packaged-smoke: pnpm run build:shared-cli && pnpm run build:scripts && node scripts/dist/packaged-cli-smoke.js
scripts.test:cli-packaged-stress: pnpm run build:shared-cli && pnpm run build:scripts && node scripts/dist/packaged-cli-smoke.js --test-script scripts/dist/cli-stress-test.js
